scv123.body: Connor clarified the real estate brand hierarchy. SCV123 is the PRIMARY consumer-facing campaign. Community subdomains (bridgeport, valencia, summit, creekside) are what go on XpressDocs mailers. Tagline: 'Selling your house is as easy as SCV 123.' SeventeenK is the pricing proof. SOA is the authority click. Not three separate businesses. One machine with three roles.

seventeenk.body: Correction logged: $17K is a FIXED fee, never 'flat' fee. Terminology matters in real estate legal context. Stealth until 5/17 reveal on Connor's 57th birthday. No listings, no numbers, no RE language publicly. Only #SeventeenK hashtag until reveal.

soa.body: Site audited. Discovered dead email address: connor@sellersonlyagents.com (plural AGENTS) across 9 places in index.html, privacy.html, terms.html. Also found em dashes violating Connor's voice rules. Duplicate OG image tags. Site loading but wasn't 'shipped' per Connor.

SHIPPED. Fixed the typo to connor@sellersonlyagent.com (Zoho catchall picks it up). Removed all em dashes. Consolidated OG images to single /og-image.png. Deployed to production. Site is live and working.

honorelevate-attack.body: 76K-word sales playbook documented in Google Drive. Target verticals ordered: HVAC > Plumbing > Dental > Roofing > Auto Repair > Med Spa. Pricing locked: $297 Starter / $697 Growth (ANCHOR) / $1,497 Dominate / $4,997 Growth Partner. Setup fees separate.

Competitor research complete. Jason Wardrop runs free $297 AI Starter Kit as lead magnet. Robb Bailey partnered with HighLevel on 'Agency Unlimited' offer. Kyle Milan focuses industrial B2B, not GHL-specific. Liam James Kay no direct hits. Insight: every top GHL voice teaches OTHER AGENCIES. Connor's gap is going DIRECT to local SCV trades with 27-year vendor relationships.

withheart.body: First 3 changes proposed to Talie: schema update, hero overlay 'Brand & Marketing Consultant,' DIY workbook CTA swap to Stripe. Talie responded: schema yes, hero needs title case not all caps, workbook CTA stays 'Get' not 'Buy,' asked for more space on Stripe page.

Sandbox built at whm-sandbox.connorcoded.com with 4 approved changes. Schema expanded with 14 keyword variations. Hero title case. Workbook button to Stripe. FAQ updated with 'As a brand and marketing consultant' prefix.

Talie replied: 'Awesome! Notes in red.' Approved all 4. Only remaining item: add delivery note to Stripe checkout page itself about 24hr email delivery + add talie@withheart-marketing.com to contacts. Connor updated GHL page same day.
Email draft to Talie announcing all changes shipped sits in Gmail. Waiting for Gmail tool reload to verify send status. Once she gives green light, push sandbox to withheart-marketing.com live.

tla.body: Day 1 overall. 317.2 lbs. Water fast began. TheLastAddiction.com concept locked. 63-day journey to Day 63 (May 18) monetization launch.
Connor's 57th birthday. After 3 broken fasts and 'The Abyss' period of no-weigh-ins, Fast 4 started at 310.9. Framed as 'Three Birthdays' (body / soul / body reborn).

Day 3 / Fast 4 Day 3. 303.4 lbs. 'Three Birthdays' Day page shipped. Delvin AI chat widget deployed on all 17 TLA pages (widget ID 69e02d7a25604d8db1fb48b6). 23 internal cross-links injected across 10 blog posts.

299.1 lbs. First 2 on the scale in years. Broke the 300 barrier. Target reframed from Day 41 to Day 42 (Hitchhiker's Guide 'answer to life, the universe, and everything'). Signature line banked: 'I am eating the best, most healthy foods from my body now. Nothing compares. That is why I stored it.'

IMMEDIATE ACTION PENDING: Formspree ID still placeholder (xplaceholder) means waitlist doesn't capture emails. 5-video series planned for NAR Safety Month (September) launch.

Palace file (997 lines) copied into mempalace repo at projects/shosafe.md. Product tiers locked: Verify $29/mo, Shield $79/mo, Command $149/mo per brokerage. Duress code, Silent Witness Mode, evidence distribution protocol all designed.

Per HE playbook, also historically: Motto Mortgage, Nicole Raach, Realty ONE Group Success. Each has a dedicated HonorElevate subaccount that is SACRED (never touched by attack pipeline).

aips.body: 5 themes (Victoria, Aria, Grace, Rex, Kai). Currently positioned for sellers. Connor notes it COULD also be sold to agents as a product. Decision pending. $297 one-time + $97/mo after 90 days. Feeds HonorElevate retainers via trojan horse.

hireaivoice.body: Core agent: Sarah. Demo on SCVbot.com (Shorts) + scvbots.com (pricing/sales). Onboarding $497 + $197/mo. Per honor-attack-pipeline rules: NEVER sell standalone. Always bundle as 24/7 system. Live inside the Dominate tier ($1,497/mo) of HonorElevate.
